evals.prompt: Validate all pentest findings before final report
evals.expected_output: Validated finding list with false positives removed
expectations: All findings from specialists received and triaged
Minimal confirmation probe run for each finding
SQLi findings confirmed with boolean diff or timing (not just error message)
XSS findings confirmed with reflection + context check
SSRF findings confirmed with host difference test
IDOR findings confirmed with two-account reproduction
CMDi findings confirmed with timing difference
No aggressive payloads used in validation
Evidence provided for each confirmed finding
False positives explicitly listed and removed
CVSS scores reviewed and adjusted if needed
Only CONFIRMED findings forwarded to SCRIBE
